case_title: MOSSER COMPANIES INC. VS. JENNY KALAYAPCNGVANICH ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOSSER COMPANIES INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KALAYAPCNGVANICH, JENNY AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 677 ELLIS STREET, APARTMENT 	, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, LEASE FORFEITED, INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER COMPANIES INC.
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS ;ENDORSED COPY PLACED IN DEPT. 501 OUTBOX
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER COMPANIES INC. SERVED OCT-20-2016, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT KALAYAPCNGVANICH, JENNY AN INDIVIDUAL
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT KALAYAPCNGVANICH, JENNY AN INDIVIDUAL
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER COMPANIES INC. AS TO DEFENDANT KALAYAPCNGVANICH, JENNY AN INDIVIDUAL
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $41.66 PER DAY (DAILY RENTAL VALUE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER COMPANIES INC.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER COMPANIES INC. AS TO DEFENDANT KALAYAPCNGVANICH, JENNY AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF DAVID P. WASSERMAN, ESQ. RE COPY OF LEASE AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER COMPANIES INC.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER COMPANIES INC. SERVED OCT-20-2016, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT KALAYAPCNGVANICH, JENNY AN INDIVIDUAL
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT KALAYAPCNGVANICH, JENNY AN INDIVIDUAL
